'''Rwookawarrump''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] camp on [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]].

==History==
It was one of five Wookiee outposts, along with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] army, preventing [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] from acquiring the [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimator]] activation codes. Ultimately, the Wookiee camps and the Republic presence in the area were wiped out, leaving the codes in the hands of the CIS. This was the [[Battle of Alaris Prime (Hunt for the Decimator)|battle of Alaris Prime]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
